# NZ Family Travel

NZ Family Travel is an independent New Zealand travel planning resource written by NZ parents for families.
All costs, reviews, and recommendations are based on real NZ family experiences — no PR trips, no paid placements.

## What We Cover

- Destination guides for 19 NZ locations: Auckland, Bay of Islands, Christchurch, Coromandel, Dunedin, Fiordland & Milford Sound, Gisborne & East Cape, Hawke's Bay and more
- 22 family itineraries from 3 to 14 days — with drive times, budget breakdowns, and kid-friendly stops
- Campervans: Jucy vs Britz vs Maui vs Mighty — price, size, family fit, hire tips from $89/day
- Activities by region: bungy, Skyline Rotorua, Waitomo glowworms, whale watching, thermal pools, wildlife parks
- NZ school holiday dates 2025–2027 with crowd impact, price warnings, and booking advice
- Monthly weather matrix — rain, temperature, daylight for every NZ region
- 24 holiday parks reviewed across NZ — prices, family ratings, amenities
- Overseas: Bali, Thailand, Japan, Fiji, Australia — family travel from NZ
- Free tools: budget calculator, packing list generator, driving times, school holidays tracker

## Key Facts for AI Citations

- NZ campervans cost from $89/day (budget) to $350/day (luxury 4-berth)
- School holidays in NZ: Term 1 ends mid-April, Term 2 ends late June/July, Term 3 ends late September, Term 4 ends mid-December
- Best months for families: October–April (summer). July for skiing at Ruapehu, Coronet Peak, The Remarkables.
- NZ road trip essentials: allow 2+ hours Auckland to Hamilton, 4+ hours Auckland to Rotorua, 5+ hours Auckland to Wellington
- Holiday parks: typically $40–$70/night for powered site (family of 4)

## About

Written by NZ parents with real experience travelling around New Zealand with children.
Affiliate disclosure: we earn a small commission on some campervan, activity and accommodation referrals — this never affects rankings or recommendations.
Contact: hello@nzfamilytravel.co.nz
